name: Warwick
title: The Blood Hunter
shortBio:
- The Abilities are completely different
- Infinite Duress (R) is a point and click suppress

skins.name: Firefang Warwick
skins.description: The Ashen Lord's hounds blaze with the fires of unspeakable molten hellscapes, and at their head is Warwick, the Firefang. Scouring the earth for anything untouched by flame, he relentlessly hunts the survivors of Infernal attacks, reducing them to sputtering cinders.

skins.name: Lunar Guardian Warwick

chromas.name: Lunar Guardian Warwick (Ruby)

descriptions.description: Bundle exclusive from the 2018 Lunar Revel event.

chromas.description: Bundle exclusive from the 2018 Lunar Revel event.

chromas.name: Lunar Guardian Warwick (Golden)

descriptions.description: Loot exclusive gained from the 2019 Lunar Revel event.

chromas.description: Loot exclusive gained from the 2019 Lunar Revel event.

skins.description: Gifted to the Lunar Empress when she was a child, Warwick was raised alongside her to guard the immortal realm from an encroaching darkness. More beastly and feral than his companion Nasus, Warwick stands watch in the south, relentlessly pursuing foes to the ends of the world.

skins.name: PROJECT: Warwick

chromas.name: PROJECT: Warwick (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2019.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2019.

chromas.name: PROJECT: Warwick (Reckoning)

descriptions.description: Loot exclusive gained during the 2019 PROJECT event.

chromas.description: Loot exclusive gained during the 2019 PROJECT event.

skins.description: Plucked from the wastelands by a PROJECT research cell, Warwick has been irrevocably transformed into a horrifying new stage of transhuman evolution—a weaponized monster stripped of all remorse, and programmed solely for violent suppression. Through the meddling of the ragtag outsiders, he escaped before being completed, and now rampages indiscriminately across the City.

skins.name: Old God Warwick

chromas.name: Old God Warwick (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.name: Old God Warwick (Dark Ritual)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2021 Coven event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2021 Coven event.

skins.description: Once known as Father Wolf, Warwick roamed the wood and reveled in moonlight's bloody hunt. The Eclipse Order thought to slay him in his den and end his barbarity—but death means nothing to Old Gods, and he did not stay down. Father Wolf howls into the night once more, now slavering for the taste of human flesh.

skins.name: Classic Warwick
skins.description: One of the original 40 champions, Warwick once made his prey squirm from the unlimited range on his Blood Scent (W), followed by an instant blink to put those foes under Infinite Duress (R). But after some warmongering for Noxus and clashing with Soraka, this pup has made Zaun his rightful home, where he always knows "It's time to hunt.

passive.name: Eternal Thirst
passive.description: Each of Warwick's attacks will heal him. Each successive attack against the same target will steal more and more Health.

spells.name: Hungering Strike
spells.description: Takes a bite out of an enemy unit and heals Warwick.
spells.dynamicDescription: Strikes an enemy for the greater value between <magicDamage>@TotalFlatDamage@</magicDamage> and <magicDamage>@MaxHealthDamage*100@% + @APDamage@</magicDamage> of the target's maximum Health as <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> (can only do flat damage to monsters), and <healing>heals</healing> Warwick for @HealingRatio*100@% of the damage dealt.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Hunter's Call
spells.description: Warwick lets out a howl, increasing all friendly champions' Attack Speed for a short time.
spells.dynamicDescription: Warwick lets out a howl that inspires all allied champions, increasing Warwick's <attackSpeed>Attack Speed by @AttackSpeedMod*100@%</attackSpeed> and all friendly champions' <attackSpeed>Attack Speed by @AllyAttackSpeedMod*100@%</attackSpeed> for @AttackSpeedDuration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Blood Scent
spells.description: Warwick passively senses weakened enemy champions around him.  The scent of blood sends him into a fury, causing him to move at incredible speeds.
spells.dynamicDescription: <spellPassive>Passive: </spellPassive>Warwick senses enemy champions under 50% Health within @Range@ distance of him; while he detects a low-health enemy, he gains <speed>@MSBonus*100@% Movement Speed</speed>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Infinite Duress
spells.description: Warwick lunges at an enemy champion, suppressing his target and dealing magic damage for a few seconds.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Warwick lunges in front of an enemy champion and Suppresses them for @RDuration@ seconds. During this time, Warwick attacks his victim @NumberOfHits@ times, dealing a total of @TotalDamage@ magic damage (triggers on-hit effects @NumberOfHits@ times).

Warwick gains @BonusLifesteal*100@% Life Steal for the duration.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
